title: Ackers Mini Measure Heavy Glass, 32-Incremental Measurements Multi-Purpose Liquid and Dry Measuring Shot Glass, Red Single
description:
About this item
Mini Measure precisely measures dry and liquid ingredients for creating balanced recipes, mixing delicious beverages, making craft cocktails, and more
Allows clear view of contents for more control and accuracy; weighted base helps reduce tipping for less mess
32 measurements permanently marked on the glass; won’t fade or wear off; increments up to 10-teaspoons, 3-tablespoons, 1.5-ounce, 2-Shots and 50-milliliters
Easily measure and transport smaller amounts without them spilling; steadier than using measuring spoons; perfect for kitchen, home, lawn, and garden
Sturdy and durable; compact for easy storage; dishwasher safe for easy cleanup
reviews_5s: Easy to read.These are heavy glass and perfect for using in medicine doses.Perfect size, good value and easy to read.Good solid glass, cute, exactly what I needed, clearly marked, and very sturdy!!! Thanks!!Bought to measure my daily dose of extra virgin olive oil. Works well. Easy to keep clean. Easy to read measurements.PerfectDoes the trick… I need it to measure a certain liquid medicine and it does so successfully!It's basically a shot glass with measurement lines on item. I use it to measure mineral oil for a smoke machine to diagnose EVAP leaks on cars.Finally, a glass that is clear and easy to read....thank you!I love that this has different measurement systems. I use it to pour and drink daily collagen, works great.
reviews_1s: None of the line are straight, needed it to be precise and it’s not! Measuring very small amounts can’t trust it!These measuring shot glasses feel solid and have a thick glass base. Unfortunately, the markings on the pair I received were not printed straight. The measurements are off, which defeats the purpose of a measuring vessel. Begs the question: how did these get past QC???
